# Bad robots.txt example - multiple issues

User-agent: *
Disallow: /
# Blocks entire site!

# Missing sitemap declaration

User-agent: Googlebot
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /private
Allow: /admin/public
# Allow after Disallow doesn't work as expected in some crawlers

# Duplicate user-agent
User-agent: Googlebot
Disallow: /duplicate

# Invalid directive
Nofollow: /should-not-exist

# Blocking CSS/JS (bad for rendering)
Disallow: /*.css$
Disallow: /*.js$

# Wrong format for crawl-delay (some parsers)
Crawl-delay: abc

# Missing newline at end of file
